channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Bitcoin faces fresh capitulation risk as 50K BTC moved at a loss
item.description: Nearly 50,000 BTC shifted to exchanges at a loss while short-term Bitcoin holders' stress level reached 2-year highs. Is BTC headed toward new lows?

item.title: Bitcoin (-31%) and Gold (-6%) are the two worst performing major assets so far in 2026. This is something we haven't seen before in any calendar year. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE16M0F0MDlSZEczQ1QxNE5lbFU0S18wZzJiLTdJYlpuQjRTVXJueU82Vk9INDFCQ25oTUUzdm5YTF9qRjQ5R2V6OWQyUnM3VWZibVFrVmVKRlMyVnQtbTAxNFZ1aDhkdw?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin (-31%) and Gold (-6%…

item.title: Why a selloff in gold and silver is dragging bitcoin down
item.description: Bitcoin has long been lumped in with precious metals as a hedge against a weakening dollar. That trade is unwinding on a hawkish Fed, and bitcoin is falling alongside the metals it was supposed to rival.

item.title: DCG-backed Yuma launches fund offering institutional exposure to Bittensor
item.description: The new investment vehicle arrives as asset managers expand TAO offerings and decentralized AI gains momentum following recent restrictions on Anthropic's models.

item.title: The Stablecoin Founder Map Doesn't Match the Stablecoin Volume Map
item.description: Emerging markets drive most real-world stablecoin usage, yet founder concentration and venture funding remain U.S.- and Europe-centric.

item.title: What Robinhood’s recent layoffs say about the current state of crypto investments
item.description: Despite the trading platform’s restructuring and the wave of crypto companies making cuts, signaling a late bear market, Altcoin Pro’s Horst, Anderson and Zhuleku explain there’s no reason to panic.

item.title: Coinbase, Circle underperform Big Tech as crypto stock slump deepens
item.description: Coinbase and Circle have posted steeper losses than Oracle, Netflix and Salesforce, highlighting the widening gap between crypto equities and the broader market.

item.title: Retail investors appear to be rotating out of gold and Bitcoin into semiconductor stocks: Since April, US gold and Bitcoin ETFs have posted -$12 billion in cumulative outflows. Over the same period, US semiconductor ETFs have attracted +$20 billion in cumulat - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTFBQbS1WQ2l2U2ZZYlY2aUtyZEtwZE1HZXQwaFJxdjZvUGtpZ0NDOENlVzIyRXBocUdNdC1TdWttaW1XN3JZZkJLTm9iOWdTa1RjblhhMnBqRU5yZ1hVU2Q2TzUxQkl4dw?oc=5" target="_blank">Retail investors appear to b…

item.title: Tether putting $23 billion gold stockpile to work with bullion-backed loans
item.description: The stablecoin issuer is extending its tokenized gold strategy by allowing holders of XAUT to borrow against their bullion, mirroring bitcoin-backed lending without selling the underlying asset.

item.title: Billionaire Jeremy Grantham Dismisses Bitcoin, Says Crypto Will Fade 'With a Whimper'
item.description: The seasoned investor has little faith in Bitcoin's staying power, expecting crypto to quietly fade away over time.

item.title: Polymarket hack updated to $3.1 million days after the platform promised users full refunds
item.description: The prediction markets giant is under investigation in connection with false or deceptive marketing practices, according to news reports.

item.title: Coinbase and OKX try to lure in Binance’s EU users after it failed to secure a MiCA license
item.description: Brian Armstrong of Coinbase and Star Xu of OKX offered new users sign up bonuses of up to 8% of their deposits or transfers from other accounts.

item.title: Binance founder CZ blames crypto's sour 2026 on mix of AI, global tension, 4-year cycle
item.description: There is no single cause for the crypto market's 50% decline over the past year, the Binance founder told CoinDesk.

item.title: Strategy's valuation has fallen below the value of its bitcoin holdings
item.description: For years, investors had valued the firm well above its bitcoin holdings, giving Strategy massive flexibility to raise capital as needed — a situation Michael Saylor and team took full advantage of.

item.title: SecondFi targets two-week recovery after Cardano wallet exploit
item.description: SecondFi says it has completed forensic investigations, taken a final balance snapshot and is preparing to return assets.

item.title: WHY DID BITCOIN CRASH? Bitcoin crashes are a recurring feature of crypto markets. From leverage cascades to macro shocks, BTC drawdowns can have a major impact across the industry. Our research team broke down why Bitcoin crashes happen and ho - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE9JUjBIQ2R6b1Y2Z0R2QW9YQkRfMmJXbTdfTU1kUUNuV3NsUVM4aFM1enJhV1RYemNXRUdGNHQ1M3dCWHhITGFuYzM5Q0VRTEFEbkpkNG51clJiYjA?oc=5" target="_blank">WHY DID BITCOIN CRASH? Bitcoin crashes are …

item.title: Capital outflows from less stable countries around the world will light another fire under bitcoin and other digital assets. AI has launched a technology revolution, deservedly sucking a lot of oxygen out of the investment world, but it cannot serve as the insuranc - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5xejgwbmlOaXJIaS1RYVd6Q3d4THlidnZYRTVHdktmcUhlb1BUbDc2dHh5N2NhQjM5WlYzODVkTG40OG00RGNBVlNyVldnWVFiU0p2eFFaZFVxVElBSlh4U0l3?oc=5" target="_blank">Capital outflows from less stable …

item.title: EU lawmakers urge assessing DeFi, staking, NFT regulation
item.description: The nonbinding report outlines Parliament's vision for future EU crypto regulation and warns against national MiCA rules.

item.title: Ripple CEO stays bullish on bitcoin but says Saylor's strategy has hurt crypto
item.description: Ripple's Brad Garlinghouse called Strategy's preferred-stock funding model "financial engineering" that distracted the market, pointing to STRC's slide to a record low as the evidence. He runs the company behind XRP, a bitcoin rival.

item.title: Dogecoin and Hyperliquid's HYPE led weekly crypto losses as AI stocks lure buyers
item.description: A rotation out of chipmakers lifted much of the stock market, with the equal-weight S&P 500 at a record. Crypto was not part of it. Ether fell 8% on the week and the memecoins dropped harder.

item.title: Securitize expects to raise $400M ahead of public debut
item.description: Securitize says less than 30% of shareholders in the acquisition firm taking it public elected to redeem, giving it an expected $400 million on its upcoming debut.

item.title: SOL reclaims $72, but onchain data flags weakening momentum
item.description: Solana found strength from tokenized stock trading on its network, but a declining TVL and DEX volumes point to fading momentum.

item.title: US senators urge CFTC probe Polymarket over ‘deceptive marketing’
item.description: Senators John Curtis and Adam Schiff are concerned about the CFTC’s enforcement ability after a “troubling” report on Polymarket’s advertising.

item.title: Ripple CEO: Michael Saylor's Bitcoin Strategy Has Hurt Crypto Market Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse criticized Strategy Chairman Michael Saylor's approach of using financial engineering to fund continued bitcoin purchases, saying long-term digital asset val - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE5XQTM3YnVzQWFSR3dHTGJXRXEwMVNLQS0xeHpKWjlJRDBtZVFhaVNGT01NMThIX3N3N3p2djBpSVYzaFdIcG1uMUVYZURMeW0wOVR2WjZLQ3FYU2l4bE9BY3lSSQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Ripple CEO: Michael Saylor's Bit…

item.title: 🚨 LATEST: Bitcoin’s current 53% drawdown is its shallowest bear market on record, far smaller than previous declines of 77% to 93%. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFBieVlCOHI4ZDY2d0t0eF9EVThKeXZ1UTRhdUR0QzdzT3RFX3hIQUxLTnU5d09uUnJzNWh3SFV1ZUVxVXJJZmN2VlNMOWRfUVp2YVdEVXRkSDB2a1lpZV96eXFxNVE?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 LATEST: Bitcoin’s current 53…

item.title: Old Ether wallets move 37,806 ETH as whale conviction faces key test at $1.5K
item.description: Old Ether wallets moved 37,806 ETH as long-term whale profitability turned negative for the first time since 2019, signaling mixed sentiment among large holders.

item.title: JUST IN: BTC is at a level that historically marks the bottom of a bear market, according to the "Bubble-Free Bitcoin Support Rainbow" 👀 HODL! ✊ - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE9FUEx5bkR3eGx1d1NSNDdDNjVrOW9kZnJJUjNnRC1yZ0ZyQ0kzbW9xeUFHcWZWZTJfTFF2VF9OTU1NRl9FN0p4TXN2Y1RwcjhXSXRBcmIxOGhSd19IaFIyTlQycXJzUUU?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: BTC is at a level …

item.title: Wall Street's Next Tokenization Test: BlackRock-Backed Securitize's Market Debut
item.description: Securitize expects to begin trading next week under the ticker symbol “SECZ,” following the completion of a merger with a blank-check firm.

item.title: Aave, Solana ecosystem tokens lead crypto rebound as bitcoin steadies near $60,000
item.description: Tokenized stock trading fueled fresh momentum across the Solana ecosystem, while Aave founder hinted at token buybacks coming under new framework.

item.title: U.S. House Democrat, who may soon run key committee, condemns crypto in 401(k)s
item.description: Maxine Waters, the ranking Democrat on House Financial Services, asked the chief of the Department of Labor to withdraw its proposal on alternative assets.

item.title: Linux Foundation, Tech Giants Launch Akrites to Defend Open Source Against AI-Powered Attacks
item.description: A coalition of 19 organizations—including every major AI lab and Wall Street banks—just built the security team that open-source maintainers never had.

item.title: Spain regulator rules out extension for non-MiCA compliant crypto companies
item.description: Carlos San Basilio said that “there will be no exceptions ​or extensions” to the MiCA deadline requiring crypto exchanges offering services to EU-based users to be licensed.

item.title: Senators Demand Answers From CFTC Over Alleged Polymarket Deceptive Advertising
item.description: Senators are seeking answers from the CFTC about recent allegations of deceptive marketing from Polymarket.

item.title: OpenAI Rolls Out GPT-5.6—But Only for Some Users Due to Trump Admin
item.description: OpenAI introduced the GPT-5.6 family of AI models on Friday, but only limited users can access them for now thanks to the U.S. government.

item.title: Former Ethereum Foundation leader warns of funding gap as governance shifts
item.description: A former Ethereum Foundation member says the network must quickly build new funding institutions as the Foundation steps back.

item.title: Anti-trafficking group says Clarity Act's Section 604 could weaken accountability
item.description: An anti-human trafficking advocate said a Clarity Act provision could weaken accountability despite existing criminal laws.

item.title: Virtuals' Jansen Teng says AI agents are evolving into autonomous economic actors
item.description: The next phase of AI agents may be less about chat and more about earning, spending and coordinating.

item.title: Spanish Regulator Says No Extensions for EU Crypto Deadline as Binance Remains Unlicensed
item.description: Crypto firms operating in the European Union will be forced to cease operations if they do not obtain a MiCA license by July 1.

item.title: This AI Agent Survived 6,000 Hack Attempts—Here’s How
item.description: Fernando Irarrázaval posted his OpenClaw assistant's inbox to Hacker News and watched Claude Opus 4.6 hold off thousands of attackers.

item.title: SEC, CFTC seek input on unified portfolio margin rules across securities and derivatives
item.description: The regulatory agencies are seeking public feedback on cross-margining, collateral and risk management as cryptocurrency derivatives and multi-asset trading continue to expand.

item.title: Kalshi Scores FIFA World Cup Spotlight as Prediction Market Trading Surges to Record
item.description: As prediction markets notch record trading volumes, Kalshi is ramping up its marketing push through a high-profile FIFA World Cup deal.

item.title: Ethereum whale who shorted October 2025 crash opens $19.7M ETH short position
item.description: Ether’s technical setup points to a potential drop to $1,375, a move that could lift one whale’s unrealized profit to $2.39 million.

item.title: Trump Administration Asks OpenAI to Limit GPT-5.6 Rollout: Reports
item.description: The reported request to OpenAI follows the Trump administration's move to limit access to Anthropic's Fable 5 and Mythos 5 AI models.

item.title: Crypto Biz: The cost of stacking sats
item.description: CryptoQuant urged Strategy to pause Bitcoin buying as dividend coverage shrank. Meanwhile, CBOE eyes crypto perpetual futures and Chainlink joins a stablecoin FX project.

item.title: US senators push to end CFTC ‘assault’ on state oversight of prediction markets
item.description: A group of 17 Democratic senators went after the CFTC’s funding for lawsuits over prediction markets, calling it an “assault” on state authorities.

item.title: Bitcoin miners secured blockspace. OptimAI miners secure intelligence. Every device becomes a sensor. Every user becomes a trainer. Every interaction improves AI. 💡 optimai.network/optimai-nodes#… - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE01WFNramZrT3E0RlVSeGZ2dWdpUGNSeG13S0RhV28xYVIyZFlLYmtEaVVNQTlsdUxOeTZuMlhEUEJoX0ZYdFZJYVlnNkVJVDJNR1BybFg5Z085Ny12LXRZTDlRbjdXUQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin miners secured block…

item.title: Bitcoin makes first sub-$60K close since Q3 2024 as tech stocks enter ‘deep bear market’
item.description: Bitcoin risked turning $60,000 into resistance as BTC price weakness persisted following another tech-driven sell-off in Asian stock markets.

item.title: Strategy's Saylor Acknowledges 'Volatility Test' as STRC Hits New Low on Bitcoin Weakness
item.description: Strategy’s flagship preferred stock tumbled again when U.S. markets opened, setting another record low as Bitcoin lingered below $60,000.

item.title: BITCOIN ETFS SEE $1.3B EXODUS Bitcoin ETFs recorded $1.34 billion in net outflows this week as investors pulled money amid a sharp selloff. Bitcoin has fallen 6.6% since Monday and is trading near $59,500 after briefly reclaiming the $60,000 level. Ether - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE13ZmxyZnhWbWQyUTlrX3RpaUNrSVJpRThiYlByOFd3ZEhzYjhWSE9jZlpUUE1mQkpHV1E2SGNyVDhFYS0zUzNvVEhJTE9MdG9JUjJieFJXWU9rOUlFREE?oc=5" target="_blank">BITCOIN ETFS SEE $1.3B EXODUS Bitcoin E…

item.title: Securitize expects to raise $400 million as tokenization firm nears public debut
item.description: The BlackRock-backed tokenization specialist expects to close its SPAC merger next week and start trading on the NYSE, pending shareholder approval.

item.title: Inside a Sandwich Attack: Lessons From the $7.5 Million Heist Against JaredfromSubway.eth
item.description: Summary JaredfromSubway.eth, the most prolific sandwich-attack bot on Ethereum, was drained of at least $7.5 million in a reverse honeypot… The post Inside a Sandwich Attack: Lessons From the $7.5 Million Heist Against JaredfromSubway.eth …

item.title: Framework Ventures raises $400M to invest beyond crypto: Report
item.description: Framework Ventures raises $400 million fourth fund as it expands into AI, robotics and energy while reportedly planning to continue crypto investments.

item.title: Bitcoin Tests $59K as ETFs Shed $692M, Options Expiry Looms
item.description: Bitcoin fell to around $59,400 as $691 million fled spot ETFs, the most since May, ahead of Friday's $10.6 billion options expiry.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: AAVE jumps 8.9%, leading index higher
item.description: Solana (SOL) gained 4.5%, joining Aave (AAVE) as a top performer.

item.title: Hyperliquid added to Singapore's Investor Alert List
item.description: Singapore’s financial regulator added Hyperliquid to its Investor Alert List, as a reminder that the decentralized exchange was not licensed in the region.

item.title: Wall Street's IPO revival hasn't reached dot-com euphoria levels, Goldman Sachs says
item.description: U.S. IPO issuance has rebounded sharply in 2026, but the bank said the current surge lacks the deal volume and speculative excess that defined the dot-com era.

item.title: BITCOIN BOTTOM? NOT YET Bitcoin has lost over $1.3 trillion in value, but many crypto veterans believe the bottom is still months away. Key indicators point to a potential floor around $50,000-$53,000, with the bear market possibly lasting until September. A - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTFBCQkpsSnJTcFZ3TUxXUndweTNMMlItcGNqOWZXQnQtaEVZeFJ4RHF3d0xweTZmbDVZckQ2cnZoSjFqcjhHWVpuaHJEZTdZZUczY2Fxb3JQQjA4SXB2WHc?oc=5" target="_blank">BITCOIN BOTTOM? NOT YET Bitcoin has los…

item.title: Morning Minute: Kraken Eyes 15% Stake in Aave at $385M Valuation
item.description: Bitcoin sinks to a fresh 2026 low as the selloff drags on. Kraken makes a major move into DeFi. And BlackBerry is staging a comeback.

item.title: Australian regulator extends no-action period for crypto licensing
item.description: Australia’s financial regulator extended temporary enforcement relief for digital asset businesses until Sept. 30 as firms transition into the country’s licensing system.
